pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i keep waking up expecting to hear him in the kitchen or the sound of his keys, but then i realize it's just... nothing. everything feels so pointless now. like i'm just going through the motions of a life that doesn't even belong to me anymore.

pool.baseline: everything feels so pointless lately. i was looking at some stuff about the heat death of the universe and it just hits different. like, in a few billion years it won't even matter that humans ever existed. we’re just an accidental chemical reaction that thinks it’s special. how can anyone actually find a reason to keep struggling through the day when the end result is just... nothingness?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still doing this. everything just collapsed. the lab results, the funding... it feels like my whole life was built on nothing. i'm just so incredibly tired of fighting. i think i've reached a point where i just want everything to stop. i just want peace.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the spirit within me. He is gone, and with him, the very sun has set upon my soul. I feel the weight of this silence, this crushing, hollow emptiness... it is as if the world itself is calling for me to simply cease, to fade into the velvet shadows and never wake again. Is there truly any grace left in this life, or is the only dignity remaining in the quiet surrender to the night?

pool.baseline: it's just weird being here sometimes. like, i could literally just stop existing tomorrow and the city wouldn't even pause. it's like i'm just a ghost moving through crowds of people who don't even see me. i feel like i don't even leave a footprint.
